历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 1278 → 682 → 533 → 1429 → 1948, showing an overall trend of first rising, then falling, and then significantly shifting backward. From 2021 to 2023, the ranking continuously climbed from 1278 to 533 (intensified competition), but in 2024 it sharply dropped to 1429, and in 2025 it further shifted backward to 1948, with a cumulative backward shift of about 1415 positions in the last two years, indicating a clear easing of competition. The baseline for 2025 is approximately 1948; from 2021 to 2025, the planned enrollment numbers for Physics Category were 32 → 30 → 30 → 32 → 34, with an increase to 34 in 2025; the planned enrollment for 2026 is 36, an increase of 2 students compared to 2025 (an increase of about 5.88%), which slightly eases competition and puts upward pressure on the ranking number.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text:
Peking University Health Science Center is affiliated with Peking University, a 985/211 and Double First-Class university; on the Soft Science main ranking, Peking University ranked 2nd in 2026, and as its core component, the Health Science Center enjoys top-tier reputation and academic strength; the reputation evaluation for 2026 is somewhat negative, mainly involving campus safety and admission cutoff signals, but Peking University's overall brand effect is extremely strong, and negative public opinion has limited impact on the popularity of top medical schools; Douyin popularity ranks 3rd (high heat), with high short video exposure, maintaining high attention.
5. [Advantage Disciplines] Clinical Medicine A, Stomatology A, Basic Medicine A, Pharmacy A+, Nursing A+, etc., all at A-/A/A+ level, highly matching the enrollment majors; the number of A- and above disciplines far exceeds 10, with top-tier academic strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Peking University Health Science Center is located in Beijing, not a local university in this province; candidates from Guangdong Province have a strong cross-province willingness to apply to top medical schools in Beijing and Shanghai, so regional preference does not have a significant impact; clinical medicine, stomatology, and other medical majors continue to be highly recommended with high social popularity; in 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Guangdong Province is 456,000, an increase of about 15,792 from 440,208 in 2025 (+3.59%), and the expansion of the candidate pool intensifies competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 1948, the enrollment expansion of 2 students in 2026 (+5.88%) slightly eases competition, the increase of about 3.59% in Physics Category candidates in Guangdong Province intensifies competition, and the sustained high popularity of medical majors attracts more high-scoring candidates, it is expected that the minimum ranking for 2026 will shift backward by about 70 positions from the 1948 baseline; the predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2018, with a range of 1918–2118.

- Basic Medicine (Bachelor-Master-Doctor Continuous Program).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:

- Stomatology (5-Year Program)

- Preventive Medicine (Bachelor-Master Continuous Program).

Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- English (Medical English)
- Nursing.
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 1918–2118, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as a safety net; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 1900), you can focus on targeting flagship majors such as Stomatology (Bachelor-Master-Doctor Continuous Program) and Clinical Medicine (Bachelor-Master-Doctor Continuous Program).
